unique_key_assumption: Safe insertion must key every candidate by (draw, lottery_type). Any future Type D operation must prove that all 4599 candidate keys are absent before insert and that no source duplicate keys exist.
required_pre_ingestion_gates: Fresh Phase 0 on canonical repo main with HEAD equal origin/main and staged files equal 0.
Production DB integrity ok, strategy_prediction_replays rows 94924, bet_index nulls 0, duplicate replay keys 0, drift guard PASS.
Fresh immutable backup of lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db plus sha256 and backup integrity check before any write.
Re-parse P213I source files and confirm exactly 11700 source rows, 7101 existing matches, 4599 source-only missing rows, and 0 mismatches unless a new source artifact explicitly explains drift.
Confirm source duplicate (lottery_type, draw) keys equal 0.
Confirm every insertion candidate has no existing DB row for (lottery_type, draw) and no same-lottery same-date substitute row.
Validate lottery_type is only 3_STAR or 4_STAR; positional digit count is 3 or 4; every digit is 0-9; canonical numbers equal sorted positional_numbers.
Dry-run the exact INSERT set and require inserted_count would equal 4599, duplicate_count would equal 0, mismatch_count would equal 0.
Prohibit strategy scan, recommendation, registry mutation, monitoring, controlled_apply, and betting advice in the ingestion task.

required_backup_plan.integrity_check: sqlite PRAGMA integrity_check on backup must return ok before write

required_rollback_plan.instruction: Restore the pre-ingestion backup over lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db only with separate explicit rollback authorization.
post_rollback_checks: draw rows return to pre-ingestion count

straight_play_dependency.existing_rows_only_dry_run_safe: Only as a clearly labeled partial-coverage design or smoke dry-run. It is not recommended as historical evidence because 4599 trusted source rows remain outside DB.

recommended_next_direction: Future Type D controlled missing-row ingestion gate before any full straight-play scan; otherwise HOLD.
exact_authorization_phrase_for_next_dire: Authorize P213L controlled missing source-row ingestion gate for 3_STAR/4_STAR (Type D DB write, backup required, insert source-only rows only, no strategy scan, no recommendation change)
p238b_interpretation: RANDOMNESS_AUDIT_YELLOW_OBSERVATION_ONLY - observation only; no strategy, production, recommendation, monitoring, DB write, or betting implication.
